title: Operations on very wide buses cause assertion failure

features.name: ternary operator on very wide bus (65536 bits)
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with operands that are very wide bit vectors (65536 bits or larger) to trigger assertion failure in StringHeap

features.name: parameter defined as shift expression for large bit width
features.description: Code should include a parameter defined as a left-shift expression (1 << N) where N >= 16 to create a bit width of 65536 or more
